name: Platform
description: An animated kinematic platform system that creates moving floors, elevators, and transport surfaces. Uses tween-based animation to smoothly move objects along a defined path while automatically carrying players standing on the platform. Supports multiple loop modes and orientation-aware movement with multiplayer synchronization.
documentation:
## Platform
Create moving platforms that carry the player and objects.

### Settings
- **Move** - Direction and distance to move (X, Y, Z)
- **Speed** - Movement speed (default: 10)
- **Loop Mode** - None (one-way), Repeat, or Mirror (back-and-forth)

### Tips
- Physics is auto-configured as kinematic
- Use **Start on Trigger** to activate with a Trigger behavior
- Mirror mode creates elevator-like motion
- The player rides the platform automatically via physics
author: stemstudio

startOnTrigger.name: Start on trigger
startOnTrigger.description: When enabled, the platform stays still until activated by a Trigger behavior.

move.name: Move
move.description: Direction and distance the platform travels from its starting position, in world units along each axis.

speed.name: Speed
speed.description: How fast the platform moves along its path. Higher values make the platform travel faster.

loopMode.name: Loop Mode
loopMode.description: Controls what happens when the platform reaches its destination. None stops at the end, Repeat teleports back to the start, and Mirror reverses direction.
